fields.name: Transaction Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the payment represented by the journal line was recorded in the bank account.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the posted payment.

fields.name: Statement Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount on the bank transaction that represents the posted payment.

fields.name: Difference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the difference between the amount in the Statement Amount field and the Applied Amount field.

fields.name: Applied Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that was applied to the related invoice or credit memo before this payment was posted.

fields.name: Applied Entries
fields.tooltip: Specifies which customer or vendor ledger entries were applied in relation to posting the payment.

fields.name: Related-Party Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies information about the customer or vendor that the posted payment was for.

fields.name: Additional Transaction Info
fields.tooltip: Specifies information about the transaction as recorded on the bank statement line.

fields.name: Account Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the account that the payment was posted to.

fields.name: Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account number that the payment was posted to.

fields.name: Applied Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the document that the payment is applied to.

fields.name: Transaction ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the posted payment reconciliation.
